mapper.insert: insert into user_coupon ( coupon_id, user_id, status, obtain_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{couponId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{obtainTime}, #{expireTime}, now(), now() )
mapper.update:
update user_coupon
status = #{status},
use_time = #{useTime},
order_id = #{orderId},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select uc.id, uc.coupon_id, uc.user_id, uc.status, uc.obtain_time, uc.use_time, uc.order_id, uc.expire_time, c.name, c.type, c.min_amount, c.discount_value, c.max_discount_amount, c.description from user_coupon uc left join coupon c on uc.coupon_id = c.id where uc.id = #{userCouponId}

select uc.id, uc.coupon_id, uc.user_id, uc.status, uc.obtain_time, uc.use_time, uc.order_id, uc.expire_time, c.name, c.type, c.min_amount, c.discount_value, c.max_discount_amount, c.description from user_coupon uc left join coupon c on uc.coupon_id = c.id where uc.user_id = #{userId} and uc.status = 0 and c.status = 1 and uc.expire_time > now() order by c.discount_value desc
